channel.title: Are We in a Bubble Yet?
channel.description: Guides to stock market bubbles, valuation, leverage and investor behavior.

item.title: How to spot a stock market bubble
item.description: The clearest signs of a stock market bubble, from stretched valuations and leverage to credit and complacency.

item.title: What is the Shiller CAPE ratio?
item.description: A plain-English guide to the Shiller CAPE ratio, its historical bubble signals and limits.

item.title: Margin debt and stock market bubbles
item.description: How FINRA margin debt can amplify bubbles, why its rate of change matters and what it cannot predict.

item.title: How our bubble indicator works
item.description: How six signals become one score, why valuation and leverage come first, and what each weight contributes.
